I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

factor values: 1.688, 1.688, 1.688, 1.688, 1.688
factor values (sorted): 1.688, 1.688, 1.688, 1.688, 1.688
The median factor is 1.688.

Converting 15.96:
15.96 * 1.688:
15.96 * 0.008 = 0.12768
15.96 * 0.080 = 1.27680
15.96 * 0.600 = 9.57600
15.96 * 1.000 = 15.96000
0.12768 + 1.27680 = 1.40448
1.40448 + 9.57600 = 10.98048
10.98048 + 15.96000 = 26.94048
= 26.940

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{26.940}
